title: Latest combat deaths show risk has shifted to troops far from Iran’s borders
summary_full: In a war dominated by drones and long-range missiles, the front line has moved to U.S. facilities far from Iran’s borders.
summary_public: In a war dominated by drones and long-range missiles, the front line has moved to U.S. facilities far from Iran’s borders.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: risk has shifted to troops far from Iran’s borders
